basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidate as per GoI rule

qualification.education_qualification: M. Tech./M. E. in Civil Engg./Transportation Engg./Planning (M.Plan) or equivalent with first class/division or minimum 60% marks/CGPA 6.0, GATE/NET qualified, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Bachelor of Planning
qualification.details: M. Tech./M. E. as Civil Engg./Transportation Engg./Planning (M.Plan) or equivalent specializations with first class/division or a minimum of 60% marks/CGPA of 6.0 (on a 10 point scale). Candidate must be GATE/NET qualified. B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/ Bachelor of Planning. Candidates awaiting their M.Tech. or M.Plan degree results are eligible to apply.

salary_details.details: ₹ 37000/- p.m. + 20% HRA for first two years; ₹ 42000/- p.m. + 20% HRA for third year

selection_process: Merit based shortlisting Interview (online or in-person)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT ISM Dhanbad Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

content_sections.text: M. Tech./M. Candidate must be GATE/NET qualified. B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/ Bachelor of Planning. Candidates awaiting their M.Tech. or M.Plan degree results are eligible to apply.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 19-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) post is 19 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) post in the current recruitment drive. This provides a focused opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF JRF posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) posts is Email. Candidates need to send their complete application and documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) in IIT ISM Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) post is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for an ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) at IIT ISM Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The salary for an ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) is ₹ 37000/- p.m. + 20% HRA for the first two years, and ₹ 42000/- p.m. + 20% HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications for the ANRF JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M. Tech./M. E. in Civil Engg./Transportation Engg./Planning (M.Plan) or equivalent with first class/division or minimum 60% marks/CGPA 6.0, and be GATE/NET qualified. A B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Bachelor of Planning is also required.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF JRF Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF JRF Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply free of cost.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for ANRF JRF at IIT ISM Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) post involves merit-based shortlisting followed by an interview, which can be conducted either online or in-person.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) post is Dhanbad, Jharkhand, at the Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad campus.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates awaiting M.Tech./M.Plan results apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who are awaiting their M.Tech. or M.Plan degree results are eligible to apply for the ANRF Junior Research Fellow (ANRF JRF) position. They should provide relevant documentation as required.
